# RPY wall scalar rational fit coefficients
# u = 1/(1 + h/h_scale),  h_scale=0.5
# P(u) = sum(p_i * u^(p_min+i), i=0..n_num-1)  [P(0)=0]
# Q(u) = 1 + sum(q_i^2 * u^(i+1), i=0..n_den-1)  [Q>0]
# n_num=4  n_den=4
# p_min={'Xa_corr': 1, 'Ya_corr': 1, 'Yb': 4, 'XcPlus': 3, 'YcPlus': 3}
# name  p_min  p_0..p_{n_num-1}  q_0..q_{n_den-1}
Xa_corr  1  2.249994311366312e+00 -9.302942542409326e+00 1.018898977062156e+01 -1.461983146752135e-01 -7.384833913349599e+00 1.974855818648951e+01 -2.040618954066672e+01 4.353438654549962e+00
